name: Baked Brie En Croute
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté mushrooms with tarragon, garlic, and wine until the mixture is almost dry. Slice or chop the mushrooms.
2. Cut a wheel of Brie in half and place the mushroom mixture in the center.
3. Wrap the Brie in phyllo or puff pastry (frozen puff pastry works well).
4. Place the wrapped Brie in the freezer for 20 minutes to firm everything up.
5. Transfer the Brie to the refrigerator until ready to serve.
6. Bake at a moderate oven temperature until the puff pastry browns.
7. Let the baked Brie sit for 15-20 minutes before cutting.
8. Optionally, use leftover puff pastry scraps to cut out small leaves and place them on top for decoration. This works best with small wheels (about 5 inches in diameter).
